title: The Spark
prompt: Ultra-cinematic close-up of a vintage lightbulb suspended in darkness. Camera slowly pulls back as the filament begins to glow softly, building to a brilliant explosion of golden particles that swirl and dance around the bulb. The particles form neural network patterns in the air, connecting and pulsing with electric energy. Dramatic lighting with deep shadows and glowing amber highlights. 4K quality, professional color grading, particle VFX.
cameraNotes: Start tight on filament, slowly pull back and rotate around bulb. Smooth, cinematic camera movement.
motionNotes: Gradual intensity build — from darkness to subtle glow to explosive particle burst.
whyModel: Exceptional particle VFX and lighting control for the lightbulb explosion sequence.

title: The Brainstorm
prompt: Dramatic aerial view of a swirling galaxy of colorful sticky notes, each note glowing with electric edges. The notes spiral and connect with neon neural pathways that pulse with data. Camera orbits the center as ideas multiply — new notes materialie from sparks of light and join the expanding network. Color-coded clusters form and reorganize dynamically. Volumetric lighting, deep purples and electric blues with occasional amber flashes. Cinematic depth of field with particle trails.
cameraNotes: Smooth orbital movement around the note galaxy. Occasional push-ins on forming clusters.
motionNotes: Continuous swirling, pulsing connections, new notes spawning and integrating seamlessly.
whyModel: Superior scene composition for complex multi-element choreography and dynamic reorganization.

title: The Score
prompt: Cinematic shot of an ornate digital scale in a darkened room with dramatic side lighting. A glowing orb representing an idea slowly materializes on the left platform, while impact meters and feasibility gauges surge to life around the scale with neon blue and green displays. The scale tips gradually as holographic numbers (8.6, 9.2) float and pulse in the air. Camera pushes slowly forward with shallow depth of field. Professional lighting, film grain, color grading.
cameraNotes: Slow push-in from medium to close shot. Maintain focus on the scale throughout.
motionNotes: Gradual scale movement, smooth gauge transitions, floating numbers with gentle pulse animation.
whyModel: Exceptional quality for subtle mechanical movement and holographic UI elements integration.

title: The Pipeline
prompt: Wide cinematic shot of a futuristic glowing conveyor system with transparent tubes carrying luminous idea orbs. Camera tracks alongside as raw, chaotic energy orbs enter from the left and transform through processing stations — gaining structure, clarity, and polish. Each station adds elements: wireframes, features, user flows. Final orbs emerge refined and ready. Neon green and blue lighting with particle trails. Industrial sci-fi aesthetic, volumetric fog.
cameraNotes: Lateral tracking shot following orbs through the pipeline. Smooth, consistent speed.
motionNotes: Continuous conveyor motion, orb transformations at each station, particle effects throughout.
whyModel: Fast generation with excellent motion tracking for the conveyor system movement.

title: The Ship
prompt: Epic low-angle shot of a sleek rocket ship with a glowing idea orb secured in its transparent nose cone. Steam and particle effects build around the launch pad as the rocket ignites with brilliant pink and white flames. Camera tilts up following the dramatic liftoff, trailing pink and gold particle streams against a starry sky. Cinematic lighting, lens flares, and professional color grading. The idea orb pulses with energy as it ascends toward the stars.
cameraNotes: Start low angle, tilt up following rocket trajectory. Add subtle camera shake during ignition.
motionNotes: Building steam/particles, explosive ignition, smooth upward rocket movement with trailing effects.
whyModel: Advanced prompt understanding for complex launch sequence with multiple VFX elements.
